opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Intermountain Mechanical has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only.
opportunities.observation: Boise HVAC customers searching after hours book competitors with online scheduling instead.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered booking widget capturing leads 24/7 without requiring a phone call.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email marketing tools or CRM detected, and no recurring revenue signals on site.
opportunities.observation: Intermountain leaves seasonal tune-up revenue on the table with no automated customer outreach.
opportunities.fix: Automate pre-season HVAC maintenance reminders via SMS and email to existing customer list.

opportunities.label: Call Capture CRM Automation
opportunities.signal: Phone-only contact with zero CRM or marketing tools detected on site or GMB.
opportunities.observation: Every missed or unbooked call from Boise homeowners is permanently lost with no follow-up possible.
opportunities.fix: Implement AI call capture and CRM logging to record, tag, and follow up every inbound call.
